entity.summary: Modular liquid-staking-token decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol operating stHYPE-focused Stake Exchange AMM pools with swaps, liquidity deposits, a public application, and open-source AMM contracts.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Valantis as an LST-specific DEX with a production stHYPE Stake Exchange pool, trader swaps, LP deposits, modular liquidity pools, and a public application. Current first-party development repositories publish the STEX AMM implementation. No exact launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Valantis documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies Valantis as an LST-specific DEX, describes modular liquidity pools and a production stHYPE Stake Exchange pool, and documents swaps and liquidity deposits through the public application.

evidence.title: Valantis STEX contracts
evidence.notes: Current first-party development repository publishes the Valantis Stake Exchange AMM implementation and supports active deployed-protocol classification.
